artifact_refs.description: Manual notebook used to author the ICR TC1 human baseline directly against bank ids.
Run-level provenance metadata for the canonical human baseline.
Maps each selected bank action to a notebook section and rationale.
Author notes for the canonical human baseline.

notes: True bank-id authoring for TC1 from scratch. The baseline selects the conservative core spine plus one validation-side greeks branch and one model-family branch (standard scaling plus selective log transform). Workflow assumptions such as trimming trailing whitespace from BD / CD / CW / FD headers are documented in notes and notebook content but intentionally omitted from predicted_add_action_ids because the current bank has no rename-columns action.
